title: FANCY BABY Wooden Farm Animals Puzzle - Peg Puzzle for Toddlers Aged 1-3, Montessori Learning Toy, 8-Piece Baby Farm Jigsaw, 25x19 cm, Educational Matching Game
features: Discover the perfect first challenge for little learners with our baby wooden puzzle - a charming 8-piece wooden farm puzzle designed to both educate and entertain. Measuring 25 x 19 cm, this toddler farm puzzle is an ideal Montessori-inspired educational toy for children from 1 year old, helping them learn through play while developing key cognitive and motor skills.

This delightful wooden animal puzzle features adorable farm animals that spark curiosity and encourage sensory exploration. It supports concentration, logic, and fine motor skills - all while providing endless fun. Whether your child is learning to recognise animals or matching shapes, this wooden peg puzzle makes the process joyful and engaging.

Built to last, our wooden farm puzzle is made from high-quality natural materials. It’s free from preservatives, paints or varnishes, making it completely hypoallergenic and safe for even the youngest children. Lightweight and portable, it’s perfect for playtime at home or on the go.

Forget mass-produced toys - this wooden baby puzzle is proudly made in Europe by the trusted FANCY BABY brand, known for its commitment to safety, originality, and quality. Every peg puzzle is crafted to meet strict European standards and hygiene certifications, offering parents peace of mind and children a beautiful, durable toy.
A lovely gift for birthdays, Christmas, Easter - or just because! This animal wooden puzzle is more than a toy: it’s a tool for discovery and learning. Choose FANCY for toys that make a difference.
description: Product Description Discover the perfect first puzzle Looking for your child’s my first puzzle? The FANCY BABY Wooden Farm Puzzle is the perfect blend of fun and education, designed specifically for toddlers aged 1 to 3 years. With 8 chunky peg pieces featuring friendly farm animals, this baby farm jigsaw is ideal for encouraging early learning through play. Measuring 25 x 19 cm, the puzzle is sized just right for little hands. It supports the development of fine motor skills, logical thinking, patience, and concentration - all through cheerful, hands-on play. Montessori-inspired and made to last, this wooden jigsaw farm is a wonderful way to introduce your child to independent problem-solving and creative exploration. Educational & engaging design This wooden peg puzzle is thoughtfully crafted to combine learning with enjoyment. The colourful farm animals and easy-to-grab pegs are perfect for encouraging hand-eye coordination, shape recognition, and early matching skills in toddlers. The perfect gift for any occasion Whether it’s for a birthday, Easter, Christmas or simply a surprise treat, this baby farm jigsaw is a meaningful and educational gift choice. Lightweight and portable, it’s perfect for at-home play or on-the-go learning. Trusted european quality The FANCY BABY brand is known across Europe for its original, high-quality wooden toys. This Montessori baby puzzle is no exception - durable, beautifully designed, and created to inspire curiosity and creativity in every child. Safe & natural Made in Europe, not China - the FANCY BABY puzzle is crafted from hypoallergenic wood, completely free from varnishes, paints or preservatives. It complies with strict European safety and hygiene standards, so parents can trust it’s safe for even the youngest learners. Fancy Baby - supporting your little one’s early development through simple, fun and meaningful play. The first years are full of discovery! Fancy Baby is a brand of educational toys for children aged 0–36 months, created to support all aspects of early development. Through play, babies naturally develop motor skills, auditory and visual perception, speech, social interaction, and logical thinking. Fancy Baby toys are designed to meet every stage of growth during the most important years of your child's life. Play & Learn We care about parents by providing them with the tools and knowledge to support their children's development through play. Our toys are little friends that help children explore and familiarise themselves with this wonderful world. Growing Together Our company has been in the market for 30 years. Over that time, we've gained valuable insights into child development and continuously expand our knowledge. We've poured all of this experience into our toys, making it clear, accessible, and practical for families everywhere. Current & Safe We update our collections every year to ensure our toys remain current, practical, and meet the highest standards of safety and quality.
